==Tips for Victory==
The Robot Guard scales with your stats
*Dis-embed your Relics from your compass
*Wait until you have 40-50K in power
*Have patience and keep growing!

''*Talk to him before fighting to get a Relic!''

== [[Nuclear Fusion Battery]] ==
"What are you doing here?"

"What are you guarding?"

"You've been here for?"

"You run on batteries?"

"Can I have a look?"

== Rewards of Defeating Guard ==

=== Guard ===

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Bio-Nuke Battery, +30|blue}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Despot Cells|black|Zombie Form}}

=== Table ===

* {{RewardIconWithLink|Annals of Joseon, +10 Fragments|blue}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Unispark, +40 Fragments|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Alien Seed|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Head of Paramara, +5 Fragments|green}}

[[Category:Home Base]]
